prerequisites: A Trello account with access to a Workspace and the board(s) you want to sync.
A Trello Power-Up created in the Power-Up admin (https://trello.com/power-ups/admin), which is required to generate an API key.
A generated API key and an authorization token for that key (the descriptor's required `key` and `token` secret fields).
A `start_date` value marking the earliest point from which to sync records.
Optionally, the `board_ids` of the specific Trello boards to sync; if omitted, accessible boards are used.

authMethods.name: API key and token
authMethods.summary: Trello authenticates each request with two credentials that map to the connector's `key` and `token` secret fields. The API key identifies your Power-Up/application and may be public, while the token is a user-scoped credential that grants access on behalf of that user and must be kept secret. Both are passed together on every REST call (for example as `?key={key}&token={token}` query parameters).

setupSteps.title: Create a Power-Up and generate the API key
setupSteps.body: Sign in to Trello and open the Power-Up admin at https://trello.com/power-ups/admin. Open (or create) a Power-Up, go to its API Key tab, and select 'Generate a new API Key' if one does not already exist. This value is the connector's `key` field.

setupSteps.title: Generate an authorization token
setupSteps.body: Authorize the API key to obtain a token by visiting https://trello.com/1/authorize?expiration=never&scope=read&response_type=token&key={YourAPIKey} and clicking 'Allow'. Trello displays the token in the browser. Use the `read` scope since the connector only extracts data. This value is the connector's `token` field. Store it securely, as it grants access to the user's account.

setupSteps.title: Verify the credentials
setupSteps.body: Confirm the key and token work by calling https://api.trello.com/1/members/me/?key={key}&token={token}. A successful response returns the authorizing member's details. A 429 indicates a rate limit was hit (Trello allows 300 requests per 10 seconds per key and 100 requests per 10 seconds per token).

setupSteps.title: Configure the connector
setupSteps.body: Provide the `key` and `token` as secret credentials, set `start_date` to the earliest date to sync from, and optionally set `board_ids` to limit extraction to specific boards. Leave `board_ids` empty to use the boards accessible to the authorizing user.
